name: ui-skills
description: Clone a live website into React + Tailwind. CSS-First generation (original stylesheets + class names), zero-vision-token AE/SSIM verification, real JS bundle extraction (GSAP/Framer Motion/Lenis), GSAP-baked style handling, state coupling verification, bundle analysis patterns (Canvas renderer, disc/carousel, Lottie asset mapping, state machine, auto-timer), result-aware pipeline hooks with multi-state extraction checks, and token-optimized SKILL.md (~6.8K tokens total). Automated pipeline with anti-rationalization gates.
